title: Seminavis robusta protocol collection
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"634qv","text":"This is a collection of media, reagents, and protocols for the cultivation and manipulation of the diatom Seminavis robusta. Our hope is that these documents will help future researchers develop genetic tools for studying this organism.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":106,"length":17}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"cff35","text":"In our (unsuccessful) attempts to transform S. robusta to confer resistance to puromycin or glyphosate, we used the attached plasmid sequences: pBS_ActAgroCP4GlyphR (an Agrobacterium tumefaciens derived glyphosate resistance cassette flanked by S. robusta sequences upstream and downstream of its Actin 1 homolog), pBS_ActEF_AgroCP4GlyphR (an Agrobacterium tumefaciens derived glyphosate resistance cassette flanked by S. robusta Actin 1 5' region upstream and Elongation Factor 1 3' downstream), and pBS_Act_PurR (a puromycin acetyltransferase glanked by S. robusta sequences upstream and downstream of Actin 1). All the plasmids used a pBluescript II SK (+) backbone and the resistance gene cassettes were codon optimized for the S. robusta genome.      ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":44,"length":10},{"style":"italic","offset":169,"length":26},{"style":"italic","offset":245,"length":10},{"style":"italic","offset":343,"length":26},{"style":"italic","offset":419,"length":11},{"style":"italic","offset":556,"length":10},{"style":"italic","offset":732,"length":11}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":750,"length":1},{"key":1,"offset":751,"length":1},{"key":2,"offset":752,"length":1}],"data":[]},{"key":"257qe","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"chr5h","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b9hdb","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"feh7b","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"file","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"00ADDE29342A11EEAFD10A58A9FEAC02","original_name":"pBS_Act_AgroCP4GlyphR.gb","placeholder":"/img/extensions/file.png","source":"https://content.protocols.io/bkwdw.gb"}},"1":{"type":"file","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"00ADDF18342A11EEAFD10A58A9FEAC02","original_name":"pBS_Act_PurR.gb","placeholder":"/img/extensions/file.png","source":"https://content.protocols.io/bkwd6.gb"}},"2":{"type":"file","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"00ADDFA8342A11EEAFD10A58A9FEAC02","original_name":"pBS_ActEF_AgroCP4GlyphR.gb","placeholder":"/img/extensions/file.png","source":"https://content.protocols.io/bkwee.gb"}}}}
